title: T-021 — GRN from PO Server Action
prompt:
# T-021 — GRN from PO Server Action

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §7.1 (FR-WH-006), V-WH-GRN-001..007.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Server Action `completeGrnFromPo(grnId)` validating multi-LP-per-line entries, creating LPs (T-016), updating PO aggregation, and emitting receipt stock_moves.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-po.ts`. Steps per §7.1: validate per-row batch/expiry/catch_weight per warehouse_settings; validate over-receipt per allow_over_receipt + over_receipt_tolerance_pct; create one LP per grn_items row (T-016); populate grn_items.lp_id; aggregate po_lines.received_qty += sum; update PO status (confirmed→receiving or →closed); insert receipt stock_moves (T-025); set GRN status='completed'. Single transaction. Outbox emission delegated to T-047.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-po.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/grn-from-po.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a 100-box PO line with 2 grn_items rows (40+60), when completeGrnFromPo runs, then 2 LPs are created with their distinct batches and po_lines.received_qty becomes 100.
2. Given require_batch_on_receipt=true and a row missing batch, when completeGrnFromPo runs, then it returns V-WH-GRN-003 validation error and no LPs are created.
3. Given over-receipt 110 vs ordered 100 with allow_over_receipt=false, when completeGrnFromPo runs, then it returns V-WH-GRN-002 validation error.
4. Given a successful complete, when stock_moves is queried, then one move_type='receipt' row exists per created LP.

## Test strategy
- RED: grn-from-po.test.ts covers happy multi-row, missing-batch error, over-receipt block, receipt stock_moves.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test grn-from-po`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-complete (manual only per baseline D12).
- Do not auto-split rows.
- Do not bypass single-transaction guarantee.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Action completing GRN from PO with multi-LP-per-line per Q1 baseline D16.
pipeline_inputs.details: Validate per-row constraints; over-receipt gate; create LP per row; aggregate po_lines.received_qty; update PO status; insert receipt stock_moves; mark GRN completed. Single transaction.

Given require_batch_on_receipt=true and a row missing batch, when run, then V-WH-GRN-003 error returns and no LPs are created
Given over-receipt 110 vs ordered 100 with allow_over_receipt=false, when run, then V-WH-GRN-002 error returns
Given successful complete, when stock_moves is queried, then one move_type='receipt' row exists per created LP
test_strategy: RED: grn-from-po.test.ts covers multi-row, batch missing, over-receipt, receipt moves
